name: cmd Coverage

tasks.title: Audit
tasks.description: Verify all work in cmd Coverage is complete and correct

scope: Raise coverage to 94%+ for all changed packages under cmd/: cmd (78%), cmd/cmdutil (91.6%), cmd/daemon (79.1%), cmd/orchestrator (91.3%), cmd/task (88.7%)
success_criteria: All existing tests continue to pass (no regressions)
audit_enrichment: Verify each cmd/ package reaches 94%+ coverage. Key gaps: cmd/daemon/start.go has 0% functions (createWorktree, cleanupWorktree), cmd/unblock.go runInteractiveUnblock at 8.6%, cmd/doctor.go tryRecoverRootIndex at 29.4%. Focus on changed code paths.

breadcrumbs.text: Created 4 children: cmd-package-coverage (3 tasks), cmd-daemon-coverage (4 tasks), cmd-task-coverage (1 task), cmd-orchestrator-coverage (1 task). cmd/cmdutil/ excluded — already at 96.1%, above the 94% target. Ordering: all leaves are independent and can execute in parallel. Heaviest work is in cmd/ and cmd/daemon/ (both ~78% → 94%), moderate in cmd/task/ (88.6% → 94%), light in cmd/orchestrator/ (91.3% → 94%).
